# CWE-820: Missing Synchronization
lang: go
file: CWE-820-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var visitCounts = map[string]int{}

// Vulnerable: shared map is updated from concurrent handlers without locking.
func TrackVisit(c *gin.Context) {
	key := c.ClientIP()
	visitCounts[key] = visitCounts[key] + 1
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"visits": visitCounts[key]})
}
